calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-10-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Marilyn Young in Propria Persona.

Ms. Young addressed the concerns/issues raised by the Court with regard to the distributions that were made with no receipts, how the receipts for gift cards, clothing, and lost wages are reasonable transportation charges, the cost of airfare at $1,800.00 per person and the hotel room costing $25,000.00 for 5 days not being appropriate, the services performed by the public administrator appearing to be ordinary services that would be performed by the Executor, services performed my JM Real Estate Group management fees appearing to be ordinary services that would be performed by the Executor, etc. The First and Final Account and Report of Executor, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Cabasares. Not reported.

Petition For Preliminary Distribution, And For Allowance On Account Of Compensation To Executor
Off Calendar Nov-26-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Marilyn Young in Propria Persona.

Ms. Young stated that the Decedent died in December of 2016, that she was not appointed until March of 2017, that the house got trashed, that squatters came in and trashed everything, that it took a while to determine what the assets were and that it was a complicated process. Ms. Young also stated that the only remaining task is for the 2016 income taxes to be completed, that they did not get any 1099's, that the Accountant put in a request for transcripts and that she is requesting that the proceeds from the sale of the property go to the five relatives in Australia. The Petition for Preliminary Distribution, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Santiago. Not reported.

Petition For Preliminary Distribution, And For Allowance On Account Of Compensation To Executor
